name: Qarz-E-Jaan
overview: Qarz-E-Jaan follows the story of Nashwa, a young woman whose life is marked by unforeseen struggles that lead her into a fierce battle for justice. Challenged by external forces, familial dynamics and inner conflicts, Nashwa embodies resilience as she confronts the darkness that threatens to consume her.

trailers.title: Qarz e Jaan - Episode 01 [CC] - 17 Nov 2024 - Sponsors, Master Paints & Ujooba Beauty Cream - HUM TV
